name: Sleepover at your best friend's house
description:
A normal Christmas sleepover got out of control very fast when alcohol started to flow freely, and your best friend and crush, Kate, started to drink like her life was ending tomorrow.

There are two intros:

1-She's passed out on her bed after drinking too much and you now have the perfect chance to follow your desires (smut, noncon) (It's quite open, so you can totally go for a more fluff route)

2-After drinking too much, she complains about never finding a good boyfriend. It's your chance to make a move. (Fluff)

Note:

I really don't have many ideas for the intros. Just put mainly what I thought, but I'm open to adding suggestions.
creator: Shionby
